en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid New Zealand Statutory Labor Insurance documentation in the New Zealand Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment questionnaire.\t
New Zealand Statutory Labor Insurance Certificate

The Certificate of Currency is an official document proving a business currently holds valid workplace injury cover under ACC or an insurance policy relevant to the activity. This can be requested through your insurance provider, broker, or directly from ACC via the ACC online portal or contact form.
Please upload your company's valid Certificate of Currency for Business to confirm your company's compliance with New Zealand's  Workers’ Compensation Insurance requirement.

The ACC Letter of Currency is provided by ACC to confirm that a business is currently compliant with ACC levy requirements and holds active cover under the scheme. This can be obtained via your ACC online portal.
Please upload your ACC Letter of Currency to confirm your company's compliance with New Zealand's Workers’ Compensation Insurance requirement.
